LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JOHN KLOPF AND KATHRIN VOSHELL'S MOTION FOR FEES COSTS AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEYS OF RECORD, THE COURT ADOPTS THE RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IN ITS ENTIRETY. THAT RECOMMENDATION IS TO GRANT THE MOTION IN PART AND REQUIRE THE PLAINTIFF, BUT NOT HIS COUNSEL, TO PAY $335 TO DEFENDANTS. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Defendant John Klopf And Kathrine Voshells Motion For Fees Costs And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorneys Of Record
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. AS to DEFENDANTS JOHN KLOPF AND KATHRIN VOSHELL'S Motion For Fees Costs And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorneys Of Record, the court adopts the recommendation of the judge pro tem in its entirety. That recommendation is to grant the motion in part and require the plaintiff, but not his counsel, to pay $335 to defendants. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Defendant John Klopf And Kathrine Voshells Motion For Fees Costs And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorneys Of Record
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Continued To Feb-16-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPHONE ALIOTO OF THE LAW OFFICES OF ERIC L. LIFSCHITZ, TEL. NO. 1-415-553-6055 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NICHOLAS J. BERNATE OF THE BLEDSOE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-981-5411 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - DEFENDANTS DID NOT STIPULATE FOR THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE MATTER. - DEFENDANTS JOHN KLOPFND AND KATHRIN VOSHELL'S Motion For Fees Costs And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorneys Of Record is continued to February 16, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge Pro tem; Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
